finalGoal: Make Threadsmith usable as a practical Context OS and skill orchestrator for all-Codex workflows before considering multi-provider automation.

milestones.label: 基础
milestones.title: Skill Orchestrator foundation
milestones.summary: Mini protocols, skill discovery, route config, and self-hosting-safe skill development are in place.

milestones.label: 上手
milestones.title: First-run onboarding / copy / demo polish
milestones.summary: First-run and demo surfaces are accepted and verified.

milestones.label: 连续推进
milestones.title: Phase autopilot / continuous gate runner v1
milestones.summary: Reduce manual gate-by-gate prompts while preserving safe role gates.

milestones.label: 发布准备
milestones.title: v0.3.0 release readiness review
milestones.summary: Local release-readiness gates passed; v0.3.0 is ready for curated PR boundary review, not yet published.

milestones.label: PR 边界
milestones.title: Curated commit / PR boundary
milestones.summary: Group the broad v0.3.0 worktree into reviewable commit or PR boundaries before any tag/release decision.
